title: HTTP Semantics, Messages, Versions, and the Wire Model · Contract Triage
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective version-neutral message and semantics model; retain the raw transcript, isolate the first divergent state, and preserve a regression corpus entry. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in version-neutral message and semantics model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate version-neutral method, status, field, content, and resource semantics from HTTP/1.1 textual serialization.
Model control data, header fields, content, trailer fields, and message metadata without inventing content where semantics forbid it.
Determine content meaning and permission from request method, response status, request context, and connection mode rather than one field alone.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Semantics Syntax Separation
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug protocol team handles case 4743 in a fuzzing harness varying every legal input segmentation. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive message content from method and status semantics before wire framing; preserve this operating constraint: one connection has exactly one read owner and one terminal close owner; then truncate one content octet and classify incomplete framing without connection reuse. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate version-neutral method, status, field, content, and resource semantics from HTTP/1.1 textual serialization.

Inspect the Semantics Syntax Separation trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Semantics Syntax Separation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate version-neutral method, status, field, content, and resource semantics from http/1.1 textual serialization. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Semantics Syntax Separation, keep Semantics Syntax Separation connected to executable Go behavior evidence.

Competency probe: Trace origin, proxy, gateway, tunnel, cache, and user-agent transformations while retaining end-to-end and hop evidence.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Intermediary Transformation, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: An intermediary forwards the original request bytes unchanged to the origin.
